driver_insight: Charminar Old City's human apparent temperature of 42.5°C is primarily driven by high building density (NDBI 0.67), low vegetation cover (NDVI 0.05), low-albedo surface materials (albedo 0.10), extreme ambient temperature (42.3°C). Based on our dual AIML modeling, the city's heat dynamics are captured with high accuracy (Linear R² = 1.0, Random Forest R² = 0.994). In this city, every 0.1 increase in NDVI is associated with a 2.61°C change in LST.
